title: The Agentic OS Setup That Will 10x Claude Code
summary: Chase AI presents the case that learning Agentic OS fundamentals, covering skills, loop engineering, and memory management, enhances Claude Code mastery and enables customization, visual interfaces, and shareable packages for non-technical teams.
writeup: This video from Chase AI argues that grounding work in Agentic OS fundamentals improves command of Claude Code. It covers three core areas: skills, loop engineering, and memory management. The takeaway is that these fundamentals open up customization, visual interfaces, and shareable packages, including ones intended for non-technical teams.
